name: Ernst & Young (EY)
description: EY is a global leader in assurance, tax, transaction and advisory services. EY's Global Delivery Services (GDS) centers in India are among the largest employers in the professional services space, offering roles in technology, analytics, and consulting.

highlights: Part of Big Four professional services
EY GDS India — major tech employer

eligibility.backlogs: No active backlogs at time of application
eligibility.gap: Maximum 1 year academic gap (must be well-justified)
eligibility.note: EY GDS hires for Technology Consulting, Data Analytics, and Tax Technology tracks. EY values align with teamwork and integrity.

recruitmentPattern.source: Based on EY Official Careers, GeeksforGeeks, FacePrep, and candidate experiences

roles.title: Analyst (GDS Technology)
roles.description: Entry-level technology analyst role at EY GDS

rounds.name: Online Assessment
rounds.description: Assessment covering aptitude, technical MCQs, and Situational Judgment Test (SJT) evaluating decision-making aligned with EY values.

rounds.name: Group Discussion / Case Study
rounds.description: Case exercise or GD on business/technology scenarios to assess analytical and communication skills.

rounds.name: Technical Interview
rounds.description: Domain and programming knowledge assessment, often conducted via HireView or in-person.

rounds.name: HR/Partner Interview
rounds.description: Behavioral and values-based assessment aligned with EY's core values.

rounds.name: GenAI & Prompt Engineering Assessment
rounds.description: Evaluation of GenAI fundamentals, prompt optimization, RAG pipelines, and enterprise security (prompt injection).

tips: SJT is unique to Big Four — research EY's values and answer accordingly
EY emphasizes integrity, teamwork, and client-centricity
Know basic Python and SQL for Data Analytics roles
Practice GD on technology and business case topics
Mention any analytics or data work in projects
Know SQL joins, GROUP BY, aggregation well
Be prepared to design a RAG pipeline or explain how to prevent prompt injection vulnerabilities.
Research EY's 'Building a Better Working World' mission
Prepare STAR stories for teamwork and leadership
